betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Gas Masks & Filters§f

§aProtect yourself from airborne hazards. Helmets handle eyes; filters handle lungs.§f

§6Masks§f:
§b• Crude Protective Mask§f: Damp cloth. Particles only.
§b• Trench Mask§f: Piss-soaked rag. Particles + chemical gas.
§b• Half-Mask§f: Requires filter. Can't block corrosive/nerve.
§b• Leather Gas Mask§f: Requires filter. Can't block corrosive/nerve.
§b• Gas Mask§f: Requires filter. Can't block corrosive/nerve.
§b• M65-Z Gas Mask§f: Requires filter. Can't block nerve agent.

§6Filters§f (equip in mask, crouch-RMB to remove):
§b• Makeshift Filter§f: Particles + chemical.
§b• Advanced Makeshift§f: Adds bacteria/aerosol.
§b• Standard Filter§f: Adds particulates.
§b• Catalytic Filter§f: Adds CO protection. Essential for Infernal Coal mining.
§b• Combo Filter§f: All protections but low durability.

§bBuilt-in protection§f: Hazmat (eyes), PaA Hazmat (eyes+CO), Schrabidium/Euphemium helmets (all), Power Armor (all).

§eTip§f: Always carry a Catalytic or Combo filter before mining Infernal Coal. Check JEI for exact recipes.
